description: Wasm builtin-function table entry type confusion - js-string-builtins references were treated like ordinary wasm functions when filling funcref tables. The vulnerable path is in js/src/wasm/WasmBuiltinModule.cpp: builtin function references did not have a normal CodeRange::funcCheckedCallEntry, so the engine could store the beginning of the wasm code segment as the table callee. A subsequent call_indirect then jumped through a table entry with the attacker's expected signature but the wrong callee/calling convention, producing wasm-level type confusion. The fix routes builtin module functions through the proper builtin dispatch entry.

fixes.description: Bug 1903219 - Allow wasm builtin functions to be used in ref.
